Name: Neal Richmond
Description: The boy who would become Neal Richmond was in fact the son of Nighthawk 's enemy The Huckster. After Huckster died, Nighthawk discovered he had left behind an orphaned son whom he felt responsible for and adopted to raise as his own. Growing up, Neal was taught many of Nighthawk's special skills and after Foxfire killed Nighthawk, Neal decided to honor his adoptive father by becoming the new Nighthawk.
